name: Kaleidoscope
description: Specializes in creating complex geometric patterns and kaleidoscopic designs. Use it for creating patterns, textures, and visual effects.
author: Artemis

input.prompt: Create a complex geometric kaleidoscope pattern with vibrant colors

inputs.name: patternType
inputs.description: Type of pattern (e.g., geometric, floral, abstract)

outputs.name: patternFile
outputs.description: Path to the generated pattern file
